text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp has finally arrived! And as we're
pumping ourselves up to meet our end-of-summer
goals...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! We've reached the summer camp facilities
at long last. How I've waited for this day.
choice_data_list: You sure look happy to be here.
You sure look happy to be here.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Well, my condition almost always keeps me from
participating in summer camp activities to the
degree I'd like.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
You've worked tirelessly to bolster my muscles,
Trainer, and I intend to commit myself just as
tirelessly to getting the most out of this camp
experience.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
As such, Trainer, I ask that you push me to my
very limits.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, my blazing-hot summer camp
experience with Mejiro Ardan is underway!
